full_text:
Wei Gu (Zhongjian) 衛固 (仲堅)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Gu (衛固), styledZhongjian (仲堅). Worked with Gao Gan against Cao Cao but was out-manoeuvred and destroyed. Wei Gu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Yuan Shao. Wei Gu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
